title: Unified Telegram Operator Chat
summary: Implemented the unified Telegram operator assistant with durable run and step audits, prepared-action confirmations, Telegram-safe tool use across connected accounts, agent delegation and control, and a shared push broker for insights and briefs.
next_action: Deploy and verify the Telegram operator chat workflow in production when requested.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-12 after the Telegram assistant runtime, router, push broker, and LiveView cleanup paths were completed and reverified.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the Telegram assistant runtime, prepared-action confirmation loop, unified push broker integrations, test coverage, and passed `mix precommit`.
resume_context.notes: The delivered system keeps Telegram as a system-owned assistant with durable run, step, prepared-action, and push receipt records. The legacy interpreter remains as degraded fallback behavior when the assistant is disabled or falls back.

history.note: Initial draft created from existing Telegram conversation/memory code, current tool and runtime surfaces, the earlier Telegram conversational-memory plan, and user decisions favoring a unified single-user assistant with broad connected-account and agent access.
Implementation began by moving the manifest to `inprogress`, generating the assistant runtime migration, and switching execution from spec review to build/test completion.

Completed the unified Telegram operator chat implementation, including assistant runtime persistence, Telegram-safe tool execution, prepared-action confirmations, unified push brokering for insights and briefs, router integration, and passing `mix precommit` verification.
